pve_actions.name: Stone
pve_actions.effect: Deals earth damage with a potency of 140.

pve_actions.name: Cure
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 500
Additional Effect: 15% chance next Cure II will cost no MP
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Aero
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 50.
Additional Effect: Wind damage over time
Potency: 30
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Medica
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Raise
pve_actions.effect: Resurrects target to a weakened state.

pve_actions.name: Stone II
pve_actions.effect: Deals earth damage with a potency of 190.

pve_actions.name: Cure II
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Presence of Mind
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 20%.
Duration: 15s
Additional Effect: Grants 3 stacks of Sacred Sight
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Regen
pve_actions.effect:
Grants healing over time effect to target.
Cure Potency: 250
Duration: 18s

pve_actions.name: Cure III
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own or target party member's HP and all party members nearby target.
Cure Potency: 600

pve_actions.name: Aetherial Shift
pve_actions.effect:
Quickly dash 15 yalms forward.
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Holy
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 140 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Stun
Duration: 4s

pve_actions.name: Aero II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 50.
Additional Effect: Wind damage over time
Potency: 50
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Medica II
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 250
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 150
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Benediction
pve_actions.effect: Restores all of a target's HP.

pve_actions.name: Afflatus Solace
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 800
Additional Effect: Nourishes the Blood Lily
Healing Gauge Cost: 1 Lily

pve_actions.name: Asylum
pve_actions.effect:
Envelops a designated area in a veil of succor, granting healing over time to self and any party members who enter.
Cure Potency: 100
Duration: 24s
Additional Effect: Increases HP recovery via healing actions on party members in the designated area by 10%

pve_actions.name: Stone III
pve_actions.effect: Deals earth damage with a potency of 220.

pve_actions.name: Assize
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 400 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores own HP and the HP of nearby party members
Cure Potency: 400
Additional Effect: Restores 5% of maximum MP

pve_actions.name: Thin Air
pve_actions.effect:
Next action is executed without MP cost.
Duration: 12s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Tetragrammaton
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 700
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Stone IV
pve_actions.effect: Deals earth damage with a potency of 260.

pve_actions.name: Divine Benison
pve_actions.effect:
Creates a barrier around self or target party member that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 500 potency.
Duration: 15s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Plenary Indulgence
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Confession to self and nearby party members, reducing damage taken by 10%.
Duration: 10s
Party members under the effect of Confession will receive additional healing upon receiving HP recovery via Medica, Medica III, Cure III, or Afflatus Rapture.
Cure Potency: 200

pve_actions.name: Dia
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 85.
Additional Effect: Unaspected damage over time
Potency: 85
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Glare
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 290.

pve_actions.name: Afflatus Misery
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,400 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed when the Blood Lily is in full bloom.

pve_actions.name: Afflatus Rapture
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 400
Additional Effect: Nourishes the Blood Lily
Healing Gauge Cost: 1 Lily

pve_actions.name: Temperance
pve_actions.effect:
Increases healing magic potency by 20%, while reducing damage taken by self and all party members within a radius of 50 yalms by 10%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Divine Grace
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Glare III
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 350.

pve_actions.name: Holy III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 150 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Stun
Duration: 4s

pve_actions.name: Aquaveil
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by a party member or self by 15%.
Duration: 8s

pve_actions.name: Liturgy of the Bell
pve_actions.effect:
Places a healing blossom at the designated location and grants 5 stacks of Liturgy of the Bell to self.
Duration: 20s
Taking damage will expend 1 stack of Liturgy of the Bell to heal self and all party members within a radius of 20 yalms.
Cure Potency: 400
The effect of this action can only be triggered once per second.
Any remaining stacks of Liturgy of the Bell will trigger an additional healing effect when time expires or upon executing this action a second time.
Cure Potency: 200 for every remaining stack of Liturgy of the Bell
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions.

pve_actions.name: Glare IV
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 640 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while Sacred Sight is active.

pve_actions.name: Medica III
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 250
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 175
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Divine Caress
pve_actions.effect:
Creates a barrier around self and all party members near you that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 400 potency.
Duration: 10s
Additional Effect: Grants Divine Aura when barrier effect expires
Divine Aura Effect: Healing over time
Cure Potency: 200
Duration: 15s
Can only be executed while Divine Grace is active.

pve_actions.name: Repose
pve_actions.effect:
Afflicts target with Sleep.
Duration: 30s
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Esuna
pve_actions.effect: Removes a single detrimental effect from target.

pve_actions.name: Lucid Dreaming
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually restores own MP.
Potency: 55
Duration: 21s

pve_actions.name: Swiftcast
pve_actions.effect:
Next spell is cast immediately.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Surecast
pve_actions.effect:
Spells can be cast without interruption.
Additional Effect: Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects
Duration: 6s

pve_actions.name: Rescue
pve_actions.effect: Instantly draws target party member to your side. Cannot be used outside of combat or when target is suffering from certain enfeeblements.

traits.name: Stone Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Stone to Stone II.

traits.name: Maim and Mend
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 10%.

traits.name: Freecure
traits.effect:
Grants a 15% chance that after casting Cure, the MP cost for your next Cure II will be 0.
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Maim and Mend II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 30%.

traits.name: Aero Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Aero to Aero II.

traits.name: Secret of the Lily
traits.effect: Adds a Lily to your Healing Gauge for every 20 seconds you are engaged in combat, up to a maximum of 3.

traits.name: Stone Mastery II
traits.effect: Upgrades Stone II to Stone III.

traits.name: Stone Mastery III
traits.effect: Upgrades Stone III to Stone IV.

traits.name: Aero Mastery II
traits.effect: Upgrades Aero II to Dia.

traits.name: Stone Mastery IV
traits.effect: Upgrades Stone IV to Glare.

traits.name: Transcendent Afflatus
traits.effect: Adds a Blood Lily to the Healing Gauge that blooms after three uses of Afflatus Solace or Afflatus Rapture.

traits.name: Enhanced Asylum
traits.effect: Adds an additional effect to Asylum that increases HP recovery via healing actions by 10%.

traits.name: Glare Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Glare to Glare III.

traits.name: Holy Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Holy to Holy III.

traits.name: Enhanced Healing Magic
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Cure to 500, Medica to 400, Cure II to 800, Regen to 250, Cure III to 600, Medica II to 250, Medica II's Regen effect to 150, Afflatus Solace to 800, and Afflatus Rapture to 400.

traits.name: Enhanced Divine Benison
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Divine Benison.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Presence of Mind
traits.effect:
Presence of Mind grants 3 stacks of Sacred Sight upon execution.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: White Magic Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Dia and its damage over time to 85, Afflatus Misery to 1,400, and Glare III to 350.

traits.name: Medica Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Medica II to Medica III.

traits.name: Enhanced Tetragrammaton
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Tetragrammaton.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Temperance
traits.effect:
Temperance grants Divine Grace upon execution.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Swiftcast
traits.effect: Reduces Swiftcast recast time to 40 seconds.
